measurement_note: Size is the experiment-row count N. The fixed nine-category domain left-joins and aggregates the table in linear work. A correct control adds an unnecessary second left join to Experiments and uses COUNT(DISTINCT experiment_id) to recover the same counts after materializing quadratic row combinations.
